name: Desktop Client
commonFailureModes: Desktop is capture only; chat behavior belongs in Mobile and Agent Runtime.
Rust layer and src-tauri structure violations are caught by lint:architecture:rust.
The desktop test script already runs Vitest and cargo +stable test from the repo root.
Desktop CI and audit jobs are path-sensitive; shared package changes can still affect Desktop assumptions.
reviewHints: Provider changes should inspect desktop auth and telemetry seams.
Protocol changes should inspect capture/session event assumptions even when Desktop has no chat UI.
